features.description: Fortify backend auth + custom login UI; logout; root redirect
Single-DB tenant_id scoping via BelongsToTenant global scope + ResolveTenant middleware; tenant-select; role from tenant_user pivot
features.notes: TenancyTest: scope isolation, auto-fill, membership guard.

features.description: 4 persona variants (employee/manager/management/hr) with real DB-backed cards
features.notes: Persona toggle gated to privileged roles.

features.description: Employee table with search + dept/status filters + pagination
360 profile: skills/personality/interests JSON, career timeline, KPI, leave
Reporting tree from reports_to_id
Kanban (todo/prog/review/done) of work_items
Weekly update submit/draft upsert (unique employee+week)
Clock in/out, late detection, unique per day, weekly history
Balances, apply, manager/HR approve+reject with balance decrement, calendar, holidays
features.notes: Approve/reject role-gated + tenant assert; balance decrement in transaction; audit logged.

features.description: KPI scorecard + objectives table
Recognition feed + points leaderboard + give-recognition (role-gated, audit-logged)
features.notes: Done. Tenant-scoped recipient validation + leaderboard aggregates; recognition form privileged-only (server-enforced). Verified live in Playwright + audit-logged. PerformanceTest.

features.description: Review scorecard + competency bars + self-assessment (employee) + acknowledge (employee) + team-reviews (privileged)
features.notes: Done. Own-review acknowledge + self-assessment (tenant + ownership asserted); team-reviews query role-gated (not just template-hidden). Reviewer rating-entry workflow deferred (ISSUES I-003). PerformanceTest.

features.description: General + position checklists, day counter
Courses, mandatory + overdue flagging
Policy sections by category, versioned, acknowledge write-path + HR ack-rate
Submit + manager/HR approve+reject, audit logged
Asset register with assignment status
Headcount, dept capacity, employment status, workload, leave summaries
Capacity bars + canned AI recommendations
features.notes: Canned this phase; live LLM deferred.

features.description: Edit tenant name/plan, branches + departments view
Change member pivot role
Activity log feed of administrative + approval events

Operable CRUD across screens: board work-items (add/move), employee add/edit, reviewer rating-entry, onboarding toggle, KPI update, training assign/complete, asset add/assign/release, announcement post
Invite member (new login + role + employee, one-time password); new emails only; role capped at manager
Fortify password reset with bespoke forgot/reset views (MAIL_MAILER=log in dev)
Two-factor auth (Fortify): in-app Security screen enable/QR/recovery/disable, challenge view, password-confirmed disable
features.notes: Passkeys backend present, frontend deferred (ISSUES I-006).

features.description: Provider abstraction (Canned default + Claude behind flag/key); live Alpine chat grounded in tenant data
features.notes: AssistantController + App\Services\Ai. Throttled. Egress note ISSUES I-010. Supersedes canned-only I-001.

features.description: In-app notifications: bell dropdown, unread badge, fired on leave/claim approve+reject + recognition, mark-all-read
Header global employee search (live JSON dropdown, tenant-scoped, LIKE-escaped, throttled)
Streamed employee roster CSV, manager/HR-gated
Real geolocation capture (lat/lng) on clock-in
features.notes: Closes ISSUES I-002. Photo capture still future.

features.description: Responsive off-canvas nav (<900px), a11y (focus-visible/aria), SecurityHeaders middleware
features.notes: Playwright-verified at 390px. CSP nonce refactor deferred (ISSUES I-007).

features.description: Salary structures (basic + fixed allowances), monthly payroll run lifecycle (draft->approve->finalize), per-employee payslip with EPF/SOCSO/EIS statutory split + manual PCB, net pay, employer cost, payslip detail view, run history
features.notes: PayrollController + App\Services\Payroll\PayrollCalculator (pure, unit-tested). management/hr-gated admin; employees see own finalized payslip only. Tenant-asserted on route-bound models; finalize locks payslips + notifies employees. PayrollTest + PayrollCalculatorTest.

features.description: Per-payslip variable inputs: overtime (Employment Act ORP), bonus/one-off additions, unpaid-leave proration, other deductions, and approved-claims reimbursement pulled into the run (marked paid on finalize)
features.notes: Recompute via PayrollCalculator on edit (draft/approved only). Claims double-pull guarded (whereNotIn used claim_ids + lockForUpdate). Gross floored at 0.

features.description: Editable EPF/SOCSO/EIS rate tables per tenant, seeded with current published MY values, verify-before-prod banner
features.notes: StatutoryRate::merged() single source (stored over defaults). management/hr-gated. SOCSO/EIS capped-percentage approximation vs official bracket tables (ISSUES I-013).

features.description: Bank payment file + EPF/SOCSO/EIS statutory contribution report (CSV) per finalized run; bank/statutory identifiers (bank account, EPF/SOCSO no, NRIC) on salary structures
features.notes: PayrollExportController (migration 000011). management/hr-gated, tenant-asserted, finalized-runs-only. Generic CSV — bank-specific bulk formats future (ISSUES I-017); NRIC is PII (I-018). PayrollExportTest. Live-verified: bank TOTAL = net payout, statutory employer totals match on-screen summary.
